Here's how insane the 2025 Topps Chrome NFL cards are..... 

You can't get some of the major hits in the retail boxes so that eliminates a lot of cool cards and drives the prices from hobby shops and scalpers up. 

So then people buy into breaks at $650 per team... 32(650) = $21k for a case break.
